role_adherence_notes.linguistic: Focused on script (Latin) and brand names ('STAR') in Phase 2; correctly identified language cues.
role_adherence_notes.landscape: Analyzed terrain, vegetation types, and climate cues (arid, white walls) consistent with the role.
role_adherence_notes.botanics: Identified specific species (Cypress, Palms) and biome characteristics.
role_adherence_notes.regulatory: Analyzed road markings, sign shapes/colors, and infrastructure standards.
role_adherence_notes.meta: Synthesized cross-domain features (camera generation, architectural style) to distinguish regions.

verdict.overall_verdict_notes: The pipeline correctly identified Tunisia. The meta agent provided the strongest signal by linking specific infrastructure (lamp posts) and image artifacts (Gen 3 blur) to the country. The linguistic agent's identification of the 'STAR' brand was a crucial, image-grounded clue that anchored the final decision.

visual_consistency_notes.linguistic: Correctly observed Latin script and 'STAR' text.
visual_consistency_notes.landscape: Accurately described white walls, scrub, and arid lighting.
visual_consistency_notes.botanics: Correctly identified cypress and palm-like vegetation.
visual_consistency_notes.regulatory: Correctly noted the blue rectangular sign and white lane markings.
visual_consistency_notes.meta: Correctly observed the specific lamp post design and image quality.
